overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large backpack walking through a futuristic facility. The scene transitions from indoor red-lit corridors to an outdoor night environment with starry skies, glowing holographic structures, and industrial buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic indoor corridor with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the red-lit interior corridor of the facility

entered.detail: metallic wall panels illuminated with red ambient lighting
textured metal walkway with grid pattern
dark doorway leading deeper into the facility

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed corridor with red ambient lighting illuminating the metal walls and grating floor. The environment is entirely artificial with no natural light visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transition walkway leading to exterior exit

events.description: character approaches and exits the facility into the outdoor night environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered exit corridor toward the bright outdoor opening

entered.detail: overhead covering of the transition corridor
bright opening showing the night sky and exterior structures
dark night sky with visible stars becoming visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered transition walkway with mixed lighting, approaching a bright exit portal. The starry night sky becomes visible ahead as the indoor environment is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large holographic gate structure under starry sky

events.description: lighting shifts from artificial facility lights to natural moonlight and starlight

agents.ego_description: walking around the open plaza area, approaching and circling the large circular holographic structure

entered.detail: large circular structure with glowing blue holographic ring and central display
tall thin towers emitting bright white light
city lights visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open plaza under a starry night sky, dominated by a massive circular holographic gate structure with glowing blue elements. The environment is exposed to the elements with distant city lights visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial exterior with cylindrical storage tanks and pipeline infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking toward and past industrial cylindrical buildings and pipeline structures in the open terrain

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial building with blue light on top
large white cylindrical pipes running along the ground
dark silhouette of mountain range against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the plaza toward an industrial zone featuring large cylindrical storage tanks and pipeline assemblies. The circular holographic structure falls behind as the character explores the open industrial terrain with mountains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, red-lit interior into a vast, starry industrial landscape. It begins within a narrow, enclosed corridor where artificial red light reflects off metal walls and grating floors. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a covered transition walkway that leads toward a bright exit portal, gradually revealing the night sky ahead. The environment then opens wide into an expansive plaza dominated by a massive, glowing blue holographic gate under a canopy of stars and distant city lights. Finally, the camera moves away from the holographic structure and toward an industrial zone of cylindrical storage tanks and pipelines, with rugged mountains appearing on the horizon.
